title: array sum
description: sum all or a range of elements

messages.description: output sum of given range of the array
onset (index to sum from, 0 is the start)
number or points to sum from onset (-1 is the end of array)
pointer to the array if -s flag is used
the sum of the specified range at bangs

arguments.description: array name if no flags are given

flags.name: -s <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of main structure

flags.name: -f <symbol, symbol>
flags.description: struct name and field name of element structure

body: output the sum of the array or a range selection
